body.body: {"AAPL": {"ok": true, "s3": "data/investor-lenses/AAPL.json", "read": "Buffett wait; Graham expensive; Lynch rich \u2014 lenses disagree, that divergence is the signal."}}

lens_why.buffett: owner earnings $101.4B / 10.0% hurdle, less 25% MoS -> $51. fails (avg ROE 164%)
lens_why.graham: Graham Number $29 vs $309. Defensive screen P/E<=15 (41), P/B<=1.5 (62.8): fails
lens_why.lynch: PEG 5.66 (P/E 41 / 7% growth). Fair at PEG 1.0 = $55: fails, PEG over 1.5
lens_why.greenblatt: EBIT/EV yield 2.9% (not cheap), ROIC 47% (high-quality). not a candidate

summary_read: Buffett wait; Graham expensive; Lynch rich — lenses disagree, that divergence is the signal.
